Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.subtitle: How Oson Uy works in brief

q1.question: What is Oson Uy?
q1.answer: A catalog of new buildings and a way to reach developers: you browse projects, floors and prices, submit a request, and the developer receives your contact in their dashboard.

q2.question: Does it cost anything to submit a request?
q2.answer: Submitting a request on the site is free for buyers. Purchase terms and payments are agreed directly with the developer.

q3.question: Where do prices and layouts come from?
q3.answer: Data is published by the developer in their workspace. We display what they entered for floors and units; for legal accuracy rely on the developer's official documents.

q4.question: How do I sign in to the buyer cabinet?
q4.answer: You need the phone number and access code issued by the developer after reservation or contract. Without them, cabinet sign-in is not available.

q5.question: How can I contact Oson Uy support?
q5.answer: Message us on Instagram or call the phone number in the site footer — we will help with the catalog and requests.

privacy.intro: This document describes how personal data may be processed on Oson Uy. For legally binding wording, please review with your counsel.
privacy.s1Body: When you submit a request: name, phone, selected project and message. Buyer cabinet sign-in: phone and session data required for authentication. Technical data: IP, browser type, cookies needed for the site to function.
privacy.s2Body: Processing requests and sharing contact details with the developer, improving the service, security and abuse prevention.
privacy.s3Body: Request contacts may be shared with the developer of the selected project. Other sharing occurs only where required by law or with your consent.
privacy.s4Body: We apply reasonable organizational and technical safeguards. Retention depends on the need for the purposes described above.
privacy.s5Body: You may ask questions about processing via the contacts in the footer. Refusing some cookies may limit certain site features.

terms.intro: By using Oson Uy you agree to the terms below. If you disagree, please do not use the service.
terms.s1Body: Oson Uy provides an informational catalog and technical tools for requests. A property purchase agreement is between the buyer and the developer; the platform is not a party to the transaction.
terms.s2Body: Projects, prices and layouts are published by developers. Always verify current terms with the developer before making a decision.
terms.s3Body: By submitting a request you confirm that your contact details are accurate and you agree to be contacted by the developer or an Oson Uy representative regarding that request.
terms.s4Body: The service is provided "as is". We are not liable for losses caused by developers or third parties except where expressly required by law.
terms.s5Body: We may update these terms; the current version is published on this page. Continued use after updates means you accept the new version.
